source: Adapted from O*NET Interest Profiler Short Form (v1) — items culturally localized for the German audience
attribution: Based on the O*NET Interest Profiler Short Form, sponsored by the U.S. Department of Labor, Employment & Training Administration, developed by the National Center for O*NET Development. Modifications: 21 items replaced and 22 reworded by the PathFinder project (2026) to improve cultural fit for German users and to reflect contemporary occupations (e-commerce, data science, energy transition, audio/video content creation, data protection). The six-dimensional RIASEC structure and the 10-items-per-dimension balance remain unchanged. O*NET is not responsible for the DE adaptation. The English text of each item is retained verbatim as the original O*NET wording; the German text reflects the PathFinder adaptation and may diverge from the English meaning where an item was replaced.

text.de: Möbel aus Holz bauen
Auf einer Baustelle arbeiten
Defekte Waschmaschinen und Kühlschränke wieder zum Laufen bringen

text.en: Raise fish in a fish hatchery
text.de: Auf einem Bauernhof Tiere versorgen und Felder bewirtschaften
Computer-Hardware zusammenbauen und reparieren

text.en: Drive a truck to deliver packages to offices and homes

text.de: Labortests zur Erkennung von Krankheiten durchführen

Auf der Bühne tanzen und vor Publikum auftreten
Fotos machen und künstlerisch bearbeiten

text.de: Einer Person Fitnessübungen beibringen

Menschen bei der Berufswahl beraten
